title: 16-eyes config
description: Configuration written by /16-eyes init and read by /16-eyes audit and /16-eyes fix. Not required — audit/fix work with sane defaults if this file is absent.

depth.description: quick = fewer lenses, 1 adversarial vote per high-impact finding. thorough = more lenses, full adversarial review.

language.description: Default language for the audit report and narration. Can be overridden per-invocation.

excludePatterns.description: Glob patterns excluded from lens investigation (vendored/generated/fixture paths).

dir.description: Directory reports are written to, relative to repo root.

markdownPattern.description: Filename pattern for the human-readable report. {date} is replaced with YYYY-MM-DD.

jsonPattern.description: Filename pattern for the machine-readable companion report.

gitignoreReports.description: Whether /16-eyes init added the output dir/pattern to .gitignore.

lastRunPointer.description: Path to the small JSON pointer file /16-eyes audit updates after each run, so /16-eyes fix can find the latest report across sessions.

path.description: Workspace/package path relative to repo root ('.' for the whole repo if not a monorepo).

votesPerFinding.description: Independent refuter agents per high-impact finding during adversarial review.
